wsgiref.headers/BaseHandler/traceback_li.name: traceback_limit
wsgiref.headers/BaseHandler/traceback_li.description: The maximum number of frames to include in tracebacks output by the default log_exception() method. If None, all frames are included.

info.excerpt: The maximum number of frames to include in tracebacks output by the default log_exception() method. If None, all frames are included.
